snapshot_call.eventDescription: One call to get_store_snapshot returning the full catalog of a DTC store with prices, variants, and stock.

track_call.eventDescription: One call to track_product_price returning current price plus 30-day price history for a single product.

compare_call.eventDescription: One call to compare_products_across_brands returning matched products across multiple DTC brands using text and image similarity. Replaces ~30 minutes of manual research.

drops_call.eventDescription: One call to detect_drops_and_restocks returning new products, restocks, price drops, and discontinued items in the last N days for a single store.

notes: Free tier: first 50 calls of snapshot_call and track_call per Apify account, lifetime.
Apify takes 20% commission. Platform compute costs are passed through (typically $0.005-0.01 per Cheerio-based call).
Pricing reviewed monthly based on usage data.
